title: SWAP IT UP !
subtitle: Solo dev challenge
intro: A supervised project I really enjoyed developing. It allowed me to combine structure, problem-solving, and creativity — everything I love about coding.
development:
Behind its simple look, there’s actually a lot of logic: 
combination detection, chain reactions, dynamic updates… 
I first built it in React.js, then rebuilt everything in TypeScript to make it cleaner and more optimized, with the idea of pushing it further.
hint:
A best-hint system analyzes the grid and calculates the most efficient move. 
The visual indicator isn’t implemented yet, but I plan to enhance the logic with a proper backtracking algorithm to optimize move searching.
